title: Drawing Pencils for Artists 14 Pcs - 12B – 6H Sketching Pencils Set with Metal case for Drafting, Sketching, Shading, Drawing, Illustrations – Ideal for Artists, Students & Beginners of all Age Groups
features: Wide Range of Shades – This set of sketch pencils for drawing includes all essential grades 2H, 4H, 6H, 12B, 10B, 8B, 7B, 6B, 5B, 4B, 3B, 2B, B, HB pencils that deliver different shades of black & gray making them perfect for blurring & smudging

Premium Wood – Made from the softest wood, these sketching pencils for artists are easy to sharpen & won’t break or splinter. The graphite pencils' lead promises to deliver smooth & velvety marks that bring life to your intricate designs

Quality That’s Hard to Find Elsewhere – The hexagonal barrel of shading pencils holds onto the graphite lead perfectly ensuring better grip for superior accuracy and precision. Strong thick core offers constant hardness throughout the lead

Sturdy Metal Box Addon – These drawing pencils for artists come nicely packaged in a sleek and smooth metal case with an inner tray to keep them sorted and organized. It is all you need to practice your art on the go

Best for Every User – WUKRAFT artists pencils set is an ideal offering for an accomplished draughtsman in your life. Comes with assorted hardness which makes it perfect for illustrators, artists, and beginners, whether they want to make precise lines or free style sketches

Prefect Creative Gift: This art pencils set is a great gift for every occasion whether it's Christmas, thanksgiving, new year, or the birthday of your loved ones. Create remarkable sketches for your friends and family as memorable gifts
